title: Claude Haiku 4.5
abstract_or_summary: Small-tier 4.5 model. Anthropic claims it matches Sonnet 4 on coding, computer use, and agent tasks at roughly one-third the cost (1 USD / 5 USD per Mtok). 200K context, extended thinking, computer-use support.

title: Claude Opus 4.1
abstract_or_summary: Drop-in upgrade for Opus 4. 74.5 percent on SWE-bench Verified (vs 72.5 percent for Opus 4). Same 200K context, 32K output, expanded 64K thinking budget. Same pricing and API footprint as Opus 4.

title: Claude Opus 4.5
abstract_or_summary: Anthropic's flagship 4.5 model. First to score over 80 percent on SWE-Bench Verified per Anthropic. Two-thirds price cut vs Opus 4.1 (5 USD / 25 USD per Mtok).

title: Claude Opus 4.6
abstract_or_summary: Opus 4.6 with new 'agent teams' feature. Coding and agentic gains over Opus 4.5; same pricing.

title: Claude Sonnet 4.6
abstract_or_summary: Mid-tier upgrade across coding, computer use, long-context reasoning, agent planning. 1M token context window in beta. Same pricing as Sonnet 4.5 (3 USD / 15 USD per Mtok).

title: Claude Opus 4.7
abstract_or_summary: First Claude with high-resolution image input (2576 px / 3.75 MP, up from 1568 px / 1.15 MP). Software-engineering gains on hardest tasks. Same pricing as Opus 4.6.

title: GPT-5
abstract_or_summary: OpenAI's first 'unified' model. Combines reasoning of o-series with fast responses of GPT-series. Launched via livestream August 7 2025; immediately default in ChatGPT, API, GitHub Models Playground.

title: GPT-5.1
abstract_or_summary: Adds customizable personalities (8 options) and warmer default tone. Three models released 2025-11-12, two more on 2025-11-19.

title: GPT-5.5
abstract_or_summary: GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro available in the API as of 2026-04-24. GPT-5.5 Instant became ChatGPT default 2026-05-05, replacing GPT-5.3 Instant.

title: Gemini 3 Pro
abstract_or_summary: Flagship reasoning model. Sundar Pichai post announces 'shipping Gemini at the scale of Google' on 2025-11-18; broader rollout 2025-11-20.

title: Gemini 3 Flash
abstract_or_summary: Speed tier of the Gemini 3 family. Frontier intelligence at a fraction of the cost. Default in Gemini consumer app and Google Search AI responses by 2025-12-17.

title: Gemini 3.1 Pro
abstract_or_summary: Preview release of the 3.1 line. Three months after Gemini 3 Pro. Targets complex tasks; broader rollout to Pro/Ultra subscribers 2026-05-04.

title: Gemma 4 31B
abstract_or_summary: Open-weight Gemma 4 family (E2B, E4B, 26B-A4B, 31B), Apache 2.0. 31B is the flagship. Context up to 256K, native vision + audio, 140+ languages. Built off Gemini 3.

title: DeepSeek V3.1
abstract_or_summary: Hybrid model combining V3 and R1 capabilities. Thinking and non-thinking modes. Reports 40 percent gains over predecessors on SWE-bench and Terminal-bench.

title: DeepSeek V3.2
abstract_or_summary: Successor to V3.2-Exp. Integrated reasoning tool use; DeepSeek-V3.2-Speciale variant achieves gold-level results on IMO, CMO, ICPC, IOI 2025.

title: DeepSeek V4 Pro
abstract_or_summary: 1.6T total / 49B active parameter MoE. 1M context. MIT license. V4-Flash (284B / 13B active) released same day.

title: Qwen3 Max
abstract_or_summary: Trillion-parameter MoE. API-only via Qwen Chat and Alibaba Cloud (proprietary, not weights-released). Pretrained on ~36T tokens. Beats Claude Opus 4 and DeepSeek V3.1 on SuperGPQA, AIME25, LiveCodeBench.

title: Qwen3 Next 80B-A3B
abstract_or_summary: New ultra-efficient architecture preview. 80B total / 3B active. Sibling to the dense Qwen3 family.

title: Qwen3 VL 235B-A22B Instruct
abstract_or_summary: Vision-language flagship. 235B parameters, 471 GB weights. Instruct + Thinking variants both released.

title: Qwen3.5 Plus
abstract_or_summary: 397B-A17B MoE; flagship of the 3.5 generation. Multiple Qwen3.5 sizes followed in waves through 2026-03-02.

title: Mistral Medium 3
abstract_or_summary: Mid-tier flagship. 128K context. Pricing 0.40 USD / 2.00 USD per Mtok. Proprietary.

title: Mistral Large 3
abstract_or_summary: Open-weight multimodal MoE: 675B total / 41B active. Apache-2.0 (open-weights). First available on Amazon Bedrock 2025-12-02; Ministral 3 family released simultaneously.

title: Grok 4
abstract_or_summary: xAI's flagship after Grok 3. Released 2025-07-09; announced 2025-07-10. Specialized coding variant followed.

title: Grok 4.1
abstract_or_summary: Incremental Grok 4 upgrade. Released 2025-11-17.

title: Grok 4.3
abstract_or_summary: xAI's most intelligent and fastest model. Preceded by Grok 4.2 (public beta 2026-02-17).

title: Command A
abstract_or_summary: Command-a-03-2025: 111B, 256K context. Cohere's most performant model. 150 percent throughput vs Command R+. Replaces Command R+ as flagship.

title: Command A+
abstract_or_summary: Open-source Mixture-of-Experts model, Apache 2.0. Purpose-built for sovereign critical infrastructure. Released today 2026-05-20.

title: OLMo 3 32B Instruct
abstract_or_summary: Fully-open frontier model. 7B and 32B sizes, plus Base/Think/RL-Zero variants. 65K context. Built on Dolma 3 / Dolci stack.

title: Phi-4-mini Instruct
abstract_or_summary: 3.8B dense decoder-only Transformer. 128K context. 200K vocab. Grouped-query attention. MIT license.

title: Phi-4 Reasoning
abstract_or_summary: 14B reasoning-tuned. SFT on curated reasoning demos generated by o3-mini. Approaches DeepSeek R1 performance at much smaller size. Phi-4-reasoning-plus variant uses RL.

title: Apple On-Device Foundation Model (2025)
abstract_or_summary: ~3B on-device + a Parallel-Track Mixture-of-Experts server model. Powers Apple Intelligence in iOS 26. Foundation Models framework gives app developers direct access. Proprietary.

title: Kimi K2 Thinking
abstract_or_summary: First Moonshot reasoning model with native 'thinking while using tools'. Open-source. Major breakthrough for open reasoning models per the lab.

title: Kimi K2.5
abstract_or_summary: 1T parameter MoE with 32B active. Open-source multimodal visual agentic model. Modified MIT license.

title: Kimi K2.6
abstract_or_summary: Agent Swarm scales to 300 sub-agents / 4000 coordinated steps. Native video input. 262K context. SWE-Bench Pro 58.6 (ahead of GPT-5.4 at 57.7).

title: Llama-3.3-Nemotron Super 49B v1
abstract_or_summary: Distilled from Llama 3.3 70B for best accuracy with highest throughput on a single data-center GPU. Reasoning-focused, agentic enterprise use case.

title: Llama-3.1-Nemotron Ultra 253B v1
abstract_or_summary: Top-end of NVIDIA's Llama-Nemotron family. Massive scale, reasoning power, enterprise deployment focus.

title: Nemotron 3 Nano
abstract_or_summary: Hybrid Mamba-Transformer MoE architecture for agentic AI. Best-in-class throughput vs standard Transformers. Super and Ultra variants slated for H1 2026.

title: Granite 4.0 Small
abstract_or_summary: First IBM hybrid Mamba/Transformer release. Greatly reduces memory requirements. Base + Instruct variants of Micro, Tiny, Small released.

title: Granite 4.1 8B Instruct
abstract_or_summary: Dense decoder-only 3B, 8B, 30B sizes. 8B Instruct matches or beats Granite 4.0 32B MoE. Speech, vision, embeddings, Guardian models also released.

title: GLM-4.5
abstract_or_summary: 355B total / 32B active MoE. Thinking and non-thinking modes. 64.2 percent on SWE-bench Verified, 90.6 percent tool-calling success (beats Claude-4-Sonnet 89.5 percent and Kimi K2 86.2 percent). MIT license. GLM-4.5-Air (106B / 12B) released alongside.

title: GLM-4.6
abstract_or_summary: 355B-parameter MoE. 200K context, 128K max output. MIT license. 27 percent coding improvement vs GLM-4.5; aligned with Claude Sonnet 4.

title: Hunyuan 2.0 Instruct
abstract_or_summary: 406B total / 32B active MoE. 256K context. Tencent HY2.0Think and HY2.0Instruct variants. Integrated into Yuanbao and ima; available via Tencent Cloud API.
